actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour (fileID: 5374773463603666079) on prefab instance 'Cube_salle2' uses script GUID 2723dba42bd113044ad231906b498006 (class: SnapToTrigger). This matches the provided script source. Object has Rigidbody (Has_Rigidbody: true) and BoxCollider (id: 1659405682678754060, m_IsTrigger: 0). Start() and Update() run automatically; Update() rotates only when isSnapped == true. The only public method is Snap(Vector3), which requires a parameter and cannot be invoked via Trigger per the test harness constraints. To fully cover Snap() and the isSnapped branch in Update(), an external trigger/wrapper (no-arg) that calls Snap(transform.position) is required.

actionUnits.condition: Baseline reset for room3 script. MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 829909757, guid: 1b862119da8709d4e9055a3c441a7bb4) attached to GameObject 'Room 3' (fileID: 829909756). Serialized refs: doorAnim->1865011923 (Animator), winton->829909759 (AudioSource). Ensure laser1 is false before other tests. Expected: No door animation or audio.
Single-laser activation. Using room3 MonoBehaviour (id: 829909757). After one SetLaser call, laser1=true, laser2=false; Update should NOT open the door.
Deactivate any active first laser before double-activation path. room3 MonoBehaviour (id: 829909757). Expected: laser1 becomes false; door stays closed.

Double-laser activation to open door. room3 MonoBehaviour (id: 829909757, guid: 1b862119da8709d4e9055a3c441a7bb4). Serialized refs: doorAnim->1865011923 (Animator), winton->829909759 (AudioSource). Two SetLaser calls in one frame set laser1 and laser2 true. Expected in Update: doorOpen becomes true; doorAnim.Play('DoorOpen', 0, 0.0f); winton.Play() once.
Idempotence after door opened. With room3 doorOpen already true, additional SetLaser should not replay animation or audio. Expected: No further doorAnim.Play or winton.Play.
Application exit behavior (run last or in isolation). MonoBehaviour_1 QuitGame (id: 829909760, guid: e9bec2616c6206946b1a15b3faa151c2). This will call Application.Quit().

actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour id 8870310304005890639 in scene is DoorOpenScript (m_Script guid=5f8d06fe579502c4496842932d0afead, fileID=11500000) attached to collider_porte. Scene config matches script: BoxCollider id=6650539076773276978 with m_IsTrigger=1; openTrigger=true; myDoor references Animator fileID=1075516723 via PrefabInstance modification. No UnityEvent m_Calls are defined; the interaction is via OnTriggerEnter. Trigger this by entering the collider with another object tagged 'Objet1' that has a SnapToTrigger component. Expected: SnapToTrigger.Snap is called with collider_porte.transform.position; Animator.Play('DoorOpen', 0, 0.0f) is invoked on myDoor; collider_porte SetActive(false); openTrigger becomes false.

Negative branch coverage for OnTriggerEnter: enter the trigger with an object that either does NOT have tag 'Objet1' or lacks SnapToTrigger component (while openTrigger=true). Expected: no Snap() call, no Animator.Play, collider_porte remains active, openTrigger remains true.

Post-success re-entry guard: after the first successful trigger, collider_porte is inactive (SetActive(false)) and openTrigger=false. Attempt to enter the trigger again with an object tagged 'Objet1' with SnapToTrigger. Expected: no OnTriggerEnter invocation (object inactive), no further state changes or animation plays.

actionUnits.condition: This action moves Cube_salle1 (PrefabInstance id=816818218, Has_Rigidbody=true) into the trigger volume of collider_porte (PrefabInstance id=86838640, BoxCollider id=6650539076773276978 with m_IsTrigger=1). MonoBehaviour id=5374773463603666079 on Cube_salle1 is SnapToTrigger (m_Script guid=2723dba42bd113044ad231906b498006, fileID=11500000) with no serialized fields; scene settings match the script. Cube_salle1 tag is set to 'Objet1' via prefab modification, satisfying DoorOpenScript's tag check. On entering collider_porte, DoorOpenScript (MonoBehaviour id=8870310304005890639, m_Script guid=5f8d06fe579502c4496842932d0afead) will invoke snap.Snap(transform.position) because openTrigger=true and myDoor is assigned (Animator fileID=1075516723). Expected during/after the move: SnapToTrigger.Snap disables XRGrabInteractable and XRGeneralGrabTransformer, repositions Cube_salle1 to trigger_pos with +0.4f Y offset, sets rotation to Quaternion(0,0,0,0), freezes Rigidbody constraints (FreezeAll), sets isSnapped=true; thereafter Update() rotates the cube around local Y by 0.05 each frame for the duration of triggerring_time. Note: exact delta may need adjustment to ensure overlap with collider_porte's trigger volume.
